ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Invalid Syncthing API key. Please check your settings.
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥无效。请检查您的设置。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Please insert your Syncthing API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中输入您的 Syncthing API 密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API token is not set. Cannot poll for events.
ast.target: 未设置 Syncthing API 令牌。无法轮询事件。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API key is invalid (401 Unauthorized or CSRF Error).
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥无效（401 未授权或 CSRF 错误）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API token to use Syncthing API. You can find this in Syncthing UI: Actions (top right) -> Settings -> GUI -> API Key.
ast.target: 用于访问 Syncthing API 的令牌。可在 Syncthing 界面中找到：操作（右上角）-> 设置 -> GUI -> API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Syncthing folder ID, without setting this the plugin will pickup changes from any of your synced folders
ast.target: Syncthing 文件夹 ID，不设置此项插件将会获取你所有已同步文件夹的更改
